questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this clip?
questions.answer_key: Riding a snowmobile across a snowy frozen landscape
questions.rationale: Core action defines the entire clip and viewer understanding of activity

questions.question: What type of environment or terrain is visible in this clip?
questions.answer_key: A frozen lake or snowy field with bare trees and hills in background
questions.rationale: Setting context essential for understanding where the snowmobiling occurs

questions.question: What equipment or vehicles are visible being used?
questions.answer_key: Snowmobiles, with at least one in foreground and another in distance
questions.rationale: Identifies primary equipment central to the travel activity shown

questions.question: How many snowmobiles are visible in the frames?
questions.answer_key: At least two snowmobiles are visible in the clip
questions.rationale: Indicates group activity rather than solo travel experience

questions.question: What is visible in the foreground on the left side of the frames?
questions.answer_key: A green and yellow snowmobile or equipment visible at frame edge
questions.rationale: Identifies perspective as first-person POV from another snowmobile rider
